$schema: Custom design system specification for Quiqlog
$description: Reference this file when building new components, pages, or features to ensure visual consistency across the entire application.

background.usage: primary = page/body background, secondary = cards/nav/panels, tertiary = input fields/hover states

border.usage: default = card borders, dividers, input borders. subtle = softer separators. All elements default to border-border via globals.css base layer.

accent.usage: default = primary buttons, links, highlights, logo dot. hover = button/link hover states. subtle/light = rarely used, available for light-on-dark accents.

text.usage: primary = headings, body text, strong labels. secondary = descriptions, supporting text. muted = meta info, placeholders, hints, timestamps.

semantic.usage: Used for badges, status indicators, and inline validation messages. Each has a translucent bg variant at 10% opacity (e.g. bg-error/10) and border at 20% opacity.

categorical.approach: Standard Tailwind *-400 shades used for distinct hue-coded categories (not covered by custom tokens).

heading.usage: All h1-h6 headings, logo text, step titles, card titles

body.usage: Body text, buttons, labels, input text, descriptions

page-heading.usage: Public guide title, section headings on landing page

section-heading.usage: Landing page section titles (How it works, CTA)

card-page-title.usage: Dashboard page title, editor guide title

card-title.usage: Public step titles, feature card titles, empty state titles

item-title.usage: Guide card titles, CTA banner title, step card inline titles

body-default.usage: Descriptions, paragraphs, feature card body text

body-small.usage: Meta info, timestamps, step counts, hint text, error messages

stat-number.usage: Large numeric stat values (e.g. GuideStats cards)

containerMaxWidths.usage: default = dashboard, landing page. narrow = public guide viewer. authForm = login/signup pages.

soft.usage: Default card shadow, landing page feature cards

soft-lg.usage: Auth form cards, screenshot hover states

glow.usage: Primary buttons, logo dot, accent-bordered containers, step number badges

glow-lg.usage: Primary button hover, CTA section hover

card-hover.usage: Card hover state (hoverable cards, landing page feature cards)

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md font-body font-medium transition-all duration-200 ease-out focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/50 active:scale-[0.97] disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed

primary.usage: Main CTAs, form submit buttons, 'New Guide' button

secondary.classes: bg-background-tertiary hover:bg-border text-text-primary border border-border hover:border-border

danger.classes: bg-error/10 hover:bg-error/20 text-error border border-error/30 hover:border-error/50

Card.base: bg-background-secondary rounded-lg border border-border shadow-soft transition-all duration-300 ease-out
Card.usage: Guide cards, auth forms, step cards, public step display, any content container

Input.base: w-full rounded-md bg-background-tertiary border px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/50 focus:border-accent transition-all duration-150
Input.label: text-sm font-medium text-text-secondary
Input.usage: Login/signup forms, any text input field

Badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium

AppNav.classes: border-b border-border bg-background-secondary/80 backdrop-blur-sm sticky top-0 z-40
AppNav.innerContainer: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 h-14 flex items-center justify-between

StepNumberBadge.editorVariant: w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-accent/15 text-accent text-xs font-semibold flex items-center justify-center
StepNumberBadge.publicVariant: w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-accent text-white text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center shadow-glow
StepNumberBadge.usage: Numbered step indicators in editor and public guide views

PaywallOverlay.backdrop: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/75 backdrop-blur-sm animate-fade-in
PaywallOverlay.dialog: bg-background-secondary border border-border rounded-xl p-8 max-w-md w-full mx-4 shadow-soft-xl animate-scale-in
PaywallOverlay.iconContainer: flex items-center justify-center w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-accent/10 border border-accent/20
PaywallOverlay.usage: Full-screen modal overlay for subscription upsell

ExtensionCTA.classes: flex items-start gap-4 p-4 rounded-lg border border-accent/30 bg-accent/5 shadow-glow animate-fade-in transition-shadow duration-300 hover:shadow-glow-lg

GuideStats.layout: flex flex-col gap-4 — heading above, grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 for cards
GuideStats.card: Card component with px-5 py-4, flex items-center gap-4 — lucide icon left, number + label right
GuideStats.usage: Displayed at the bottom of the /home page. Receives pre-fetched counts as props (drafts, published, recentCount).

EmptyState.classes: text-center py-20 rounded-lg border border-dashed border-border animate-fade-in
EmptyState.heading: font-heading font-semibold text-lg text-text-primary mb-2

InlineEditableField.titleInput: flex-1 font-heading font-medium text-base text-text-primary bg-transparent border-none outline-none focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-text-muted
InlineEditableField.textarea: w-full resize-none bg-transparent text-sm text-text-secondary placeholder:text-text-muted border-none outline-none focus:ring-0 overflow-hidden
InlineEditableField.usage: Step titles and descriptions in editor

links.cardTitle: font-heading font-semibold text-base text-text-primary hover:text-accent transition-colors

glassCard.definition: background: rgba(22, 27, 39, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid #2A3147
glassCard.usage: Semi-transparent card effect (utility available, used sparingly)

screenshotContainer.classes: rounded-md overflow-hidden border border-border transition-shadow duration-300 hover:shadow-soft-lg
screenshotContainer.usage: Wraps step screenshots in both editor and public views

featureListItem.checkmark: flex-shrink-0 w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-accent/15 flex items-center justify-center

sectionDivider.usage: Used within cards (action rows), between page sections, in footers

pageLayout.centeredAuth: min-h-screen bg-background flex items-center justify-center p-4
pageLayout.contentArea: flex-1 max-w-6xl w-full mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 py-8
pageLayout.bottomAnchored: flex flex-col min-h-full — place a flex-1 spacer div between top content and bottom content to push the bottom section to the foot of the viewport

fadeIn.usage: CTA banners, empty states, paywall backdrop

slideUp.usage: Hero headline, subtitle, CTA buttons on landing page

cardEnter.usage: Card entrance animation (guide cards, step cards). Use with animate prop on Card component.

staggering.usage: Applied to card grids and step lists for cascading entrance. Wrap items in a div with stagger-N class.

microInteractions.transitionDefaults: transition-all duration-200 ease-out (buttons), transition-all duration-300 ease-out (cards)

icons.approach: Mix of inline SVGs and lucide-react. Use lucide-react for UI components (stat cards, nav, action buttons). Use inline SVGs for custom/branded shapes (drag handle dots, step number badges).

library.name: lucide-react
library.usage: Preferred for standard UI icons. Pass size prop (e.g. size={20}) and className for color. Use currentColor via Tailwind text-* classes.

usedIcons.CalendarDays: Recorded in last 7 days stat card

style.sizing: w-4 h-4 (small), w-6 h-6 (medium icons), w-2.5 h-2.5 (checkmarks inside circles)

usedIcons.spinner: Circular loading spinner (SVG with animate-spin h-4 w-4)
usedIcons.dragHandle: 6-dot grip pattern (2x3 grid of circles, 16x16 viewBox)
usedIcons.emojis: Used as decorative icons: 🧩 (extension), 📖 (guides empty), 📬 (email sent), 🎬 ✏️ 🔗 (feature cards), ☕ (footer)

icons.guidelines: Use lucide-react for new UI icons. Use inline SVGs only when a custom shape is needed. Always use currentColor (via Tailwind text-* class) so icons inherit color from context. Emoji usage is acceptable for decorative/non-functional icons.

focusStates.inlineEditable: focus:ring-0 (no ring for inline editable fields to keep them feeling seamless)

responsiveBreakpoints.patterns: Mobile-first. Landing hero text scales from text-5xl→text-6xl at sm. Public guide title from text-3xl→text-4xl at sm. Container padding from px-4→px-6 at sm.

newComponents: Use bg-background-secondary for card/panel backgrounds, never bg-background (that's for page body).
Always use border border-border on cards and containers.
Use font-heading for headings and font-body for everything else.
Use the Button component (not raw <button>) for all interactive buttons.
Use the Card component for any content container — set hoverable for clickable cards, animate for entrance animations.
Use the Input component for form fields to get consistent styling, labels, and error display.
Use the Badge component for status labels and tags.
Apply shadow-soft as default elevation for cards; shadow-glow for accent-highlighted elements.
Use transition-all duration-200 ease-out for interactive elements, duration-300 for cards.
Use lucide-react for standard UI icons. Reserve inline SVGs for custom shapes. Use currentColor via Tailwind text-* for icon colors.
Use text-text-primary for main content, text-text-secondary for descriptions, text-text-muted for meta/hints.
For semantic colors (success/warning/error), use translucent backgrounds (color/10) with matching text and borders (color/20).
Apply animate-card-enter + stagger-N classes for list item entrance animations.
Keep max-w-6xl for main content areas, max-w-3xl for reading-focused pages.
Use gap-based spacing (flexbox/grid) rather than margin for layout gaps.
